title: Watch: RIIZE Shows You How To “Do your dance” In High-Energy Dance Practice Video
content:
RIIZE is back with an exciting new dance video! On June 23, RIIZE released the official dance practice video for “Do your dance,” the title track of their new mini album “II.” The newly released video offers a full view of the intense choreography for “Do your dance,” including the members’ skillful dance moves and… Continue reading Watch: RIIZE Shows You How To “Do your dance” In High-Energy Dance Practice Video

title_zh: RIIZE公开新曲《Do your dance》高能舞蹈练习视频
facts_list: 6月23日，RIIZE公开了迷你专辑《II》主打曲《Do your dance》的官方舞蹈练习视频
视频展示了成员们精湛的舞蹈动作和完整编舞
summary_zh: 6月23日，RIIZE发布了迷你专辑《II》主打曲《Do your dance》的官方舞蹈练习视频，视频完整呈现了高强度编舞和成员们的熟练舞技。

title: BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet
content:
BOYNEXTDOOR has just scored their first-ever top 20 album in the United States! On June 23 local time, Billboard announced that BOYNEXTDOOR’s new studio album “HOME” had debuted at No. 16 on its Top 200 Albums chart, which ranks the most popular albums in the United States. “HOME” has now become BOYNEXTDOOR’s highest-ranking album on… Continue reading BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet
The post BOYNEXTDOOR Enters Top 20 Of Billboard 200 For 1st Time As “HOME” Achieves Their Best U.S. Sales Week Yet appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BOYNEXTDOOR《HOME》首入Billboard 200前20，创美国最佳销量周
facts_list: 6月23日（当地时间），Billboard宣布BOYNEXTDOOR新专辑《HOME》在Billboard 200专辑榜空降第16位
这是BOYNEXTDOOR首次进入该榜单前20名，也是其在美国销量最高的一周
summary_zh: 6月23日，Billboard公布BOYNEXTDOOR新专辑《HOME》在Billboard 200专辑榜空降第16位，创下该组合首次进入前20名及美国最佳销量周纪录。

title: Watch: DIA’s Ki Huihyeon And Lee Sang Yoon From “Heart Pairing” Reveal That They’re Dating
content:
DIA’s Ki Huihyeon and Lee Sang Yoon are in a relationship! Ki Huihyeon added in the caption, “Making memories through CCTV on our first trip to Osaka.” The couple also separately… Continue reading Watch: DIA’s Ki Huihyeon And Lee Sang Yoon From “Heart Pairing” Reveal That They’re Dating

title_zh: DIA奇熙贤与李尚允公开恋情，晒大阪旅行视频
facts_list: 6月23日，DIA成员奇熙贤与李尚允通过Instagram共同发布一段在大阪的旅行视频，公开恋情
奇熙贤在配文中写道：“通过CCTV记录我们首次大阪之旅的回忆”
summary_zh: 6月23日，DIA成员奇熙贤与李尚允通过Instagram共同发布一段在大阪的旅行视频，公开恋情。奇熙贤在配文中写道：“通过CCTV记录我们首次大阪之旅的回忆”。两人曾共同出演节目《Heart Pairing》。
